text:
Kurt Jaeger has provided me with webspace.

The patch is attached, ports/166223 is a prerequisite
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166223

Apply with patch -E, it removes a file.

-- 
A: Because it fouls the order in which people normally read text.
